languages.text: "Как-как? Я не расслышала, или вы и вправду назвали фамилию рода, погибшего в варп-переходе сотню лет назад?"

traits.locale_text: "Как-как? Я не расслышала, или вы и вправду назвали фамилию рода, погибшего в варп-переходе сотню лет назад?"

languages.text: "I beg your pardon? Did I mishear, or did you claim to be a member of a family that perished in a warp jump a hundred years ago?"
languages.original_text: "Как-как? Я не расслышала, или вы и вправду назвали фамилию рода, погибшего в варп-переходе сотню лет назад?"

traits.locale_text: "I beg your pardon? Did I mishear, or did you claim to be a member of a family that perished in a warp jump a hundred years ago?"
"I beg your pardon? Did I mishear, or did you claim to be a member of a family that perished in a warp jump a hundred years ago?"
"I beg your pardon? Did I mishear, or did you claim to be a member of a family that perished in a warp jump a hundred years ago?"

languages.text: “你说什么？是我听错了吗？你自称出身于一个百年前就在亚空间跳跃中覆灭了的家族？”
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon? Did I mishear, or did you claim to be a member of a family that perished in a warp jump a hundred years ago?"

traits.locale_text: “你说什么？是我听错了吗？你自称出身于一个百年前就在亚空间跳跃中覆灭了的家族？”

languages.text: « Je vous demande pardon ? Aurais-je mal entendu, ou venez-vous de prétendre que vous êtes membre d'une famille qui a péri lors d'un saut Warp il y a cent ans ? »
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon? Did I mishear, or did you claim to be a member of a family that perished in a warp jump a hundred years ago?"

traits.locale_text: « Je vous demande pardon ? Aurais-je mal entendu, ou venez-vous de prétendre que vous êtes membre d'une famille qui a péri lors d'un saut Warp il y a cent ans ? »

languages.text: "Nasıl yani? Yanlış mı duydum yoksa yüz yıl önce bir öteboyut atlayışında yok olan bir ailenin üyesi olduğunuzu mu iddia ettiniz?"
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon? Did I mishear, or did you claim to be a member of a family that perished in a warp jump a hundred years ago?"

traits.locale_text: "Nasıl yani? Yanlış mı duydum yoksa yüz yıl önce bir öteboyut atlayışında yok olan bir ailenin üyesi olduğunuzu mu iddia ettiniz?"

languages.text: «¿Cómo dice? ¿Me equivoco, o acaba de afirmar ser miembro de una familia que pereció en un salto de disformidad hace cien años?».
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon? Did I mishear, or did you claim to be a member of a family that perished in a warp jump a hundred years ago?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Cómo dice? ¿Me equivoco, o acaba de afirmar ser miembro de una familia que pereció en un salto de disformidad hace cien años?».

languages.text: "Bitte? Habe ich mich verhört oder habt Ihr gerade behauptet, einer Familie anzugehören, die vor hundert Jahren während eines Warpsprungs verschwand?"
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon? Did I mishear, or did you claim to be a member of a family that perished in a warp jump a hundred years ago?"

traits.locale_text: "Bitte? Habe ich mich verhört oder habt Ihr gerade behauptet, einer Familie anzugehören, die vor hundert Jahren während eines Warpsprungs verschwand?"

languages.text: 「失礼ですが、聞き間違えましたか？それとも、100年前のワープジャンプで滅んだ家族の一員だと主張されましたか？」
languages.original_text: "I beg your pardon? Did I mishear, or did you claim to be a member of a family that perished in a warp jump a hundred years ago?"

traits.locale_text: 「失礼ですが、聞き間違えましたか？それとも、100年前のワープジャンプで滅んだ家族の一員だと主張されましたか？」
